title: among us - Mongus
description: Brings the iconic crewmate Among Us character into Minecraft as a mob, with a survival-friendly spawn egg so you can unleash the sus anywhere.
body:
# _Mongus_ 🚨

### ✨ Features

- Adds a new Among Us crewmate mob.
- Craftable spawn egg for survival-friendly summoning.
- _**Lightweight**_, _**simple**_, and _**easy to use in any world**_.
- Perfect for _**memes**_, _**roleplay**_, or _**fun builds**_.

### 🛠 How to Use

- Spawn the crewmate using **the craftable spawn egg**.
- Watch out… it might be a little sus 👀.

### ⚠️ Notes

- This is a **fan-made mod**.
- **Not affiliated with Innersloth**.
- Designed for **fun** and **creativity**, not competitive gameplay.

### 🎮 Fun Fact

Every world is a little more suspicious with Mongus around. Who knows… someone might be sus!
